name: Jon Wick | Date Everything
description:
!SPOILERS!

"So, you wanna fuck?"

— Jon Wick

unfortunately, I still haven't finished his route...it lags a lot for me. but I watched his ending and realization on youtube. I hope I can fix my game anyway and then an update will definitely come out. It was done in a hurry and it's not very good, actually.

is he pretty headcanon now? this is the version after realisation and love end obviously.

btw I hated scandalabra firstly...but then I got curious and I saw him...boom.

if you don't like his answer — swipe or... write him about it. he may not be canonical or write nonsense, he may write for you, etc. you know.

I have more date everything bots in my profile. i also take requests. If I like an idea, I will do it.
creator: rubymoon
